subject: english
topic_title: Comprehension: Reading to Grasp Words in Context
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Explain how words take meaning from context
Identify suitable synonyms for words as used in a passage
Distinguish contextual meaning from general dictionary meaning

sections.heading: Contextual Usage of Words
sections.content: The passage compares men and women in discussion and shows that words can take different meanings in different contexts.

sections.heading: Examples
sections.content: The note explains that 'man' may mean an adult male, to guide, or to take charge depending on the sentence. It also explains that 'sex' in the passage means gender, while in another context it may mean intercourse. 'Leave' may mean make, vacate, or a short break from work.
